ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the asset belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the asset belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the asset is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "futures_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each futures contract */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the contract is for */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Current market price of the asset */,
  "future_price" REAL /* Future price of the asset */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the contract */,
  "cost_of_carry" REAL /* Cost of carry for the contract */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest in the contract */,
  "percent_change_open_interest" REAL /* Percentage change in open interest */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the futures contract */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Size of the contract in terms of the underlying asset */,
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying asset (if different from the primary asset) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_futures_contracts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_futures_contracts_underlying_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("underlying_asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset on the date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset on the date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trading on the date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the asset */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_prices_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset involved in the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., trade, view) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the futures contract involved in the activity (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES futures_contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
